name: Seafood Primavera Pasta Pizza
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Sauce:
1 cup Half & half
4 Egg yolks, beaten
1 cup Freshly grated Parmesan cheese
1 tablespoon Dry sherry
1/8 teaspoon Garlic salt
1/8 teaspoon Pepper
Filling:
--------
2 tablespoons Butter, softened to...
4 tablespoons Butter
1/2 cup Sliced green onions
1/2 cup Red bell pepper cut into 1-inch strips
1 Garlic clove, minced
2 cups Green Giant American Mixtures Manhattan Style Frozen Broccoli, Cauliflower, Pea Pods & Yellow Peppers, thawed and chopped
4 1/2 ounces Jar Green Giant Sliced Mushrooms, drained
3 cups Seafood (small uncooked shelled shrimp, bay scallops, and imitation crab meat)
1 1/4 cups Shredded mozzarella cheese
Cook vermicelli to desired doneness as directed on package. Drain; keep warm. Heat oven to 350 degrees. Spray 12-inch pizza pan or 13 x 9-inch pan with nonstick cooking spray. In a large bowl, combine hot vermicelli, 1/4 cup melted butter, 1/2 cup Parmesan and 1 1/2 tablespoons garlic salt; mix well. Fold in 3 eggs. Spread mixture evenly in spray-coated pan, forming a rim around the edge. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until set. In a medium saucepan using wire whisk, beat half & half and 4 egg yolks until well blended. Cook over medium-low heat until mixture comes to a boil, stirring constantly. Add 1 cup Parmesan cheese, sherry, 1/8 tablespoon garlic salt and pepper; cook and stir until mixture thickens. Remove from heat; cover and set aside. Melt 2 tablespoons Butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions, bell pepper and garlic; cook and stir 2 to 3 minutes or until crisp-tender. Add vegetables and mushrooms; cook and stir 5 to 6 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender. Add seafood to skillet; cook 2 to 3 minutes or just until seafood becomes opaque. Fold sauce into seafood mixture. Pour over pasta crust; top with mozzarella cheese. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes or until cheese melts. Broil for 2 to 4 minutes or until cheese is bubbly and lightly browned. Let stand 5 to 10 minutes. If desired, garnish whole pizza with cooked butterflied shrimp and fresh basil or garnish individual servings with additional cooked shrimp, scallops and paprika.
